revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-070

Modulation in which the time of occurrence of some characteristic of a pulse carrier is varied from the unmodulated value.


Note: This is a general term which includes several forms of modulation such as pulse duration, pulse position and pulse interval modulation.

Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Pulse time modulation (PTM)}}
